---
name: AI Todo Platform
description: An AI-powered todo platform for efficient task management — dark, indigo-blue theme with purposeful animations
---

# Design System: AI Todo Platform

## 1. Overview

**Creative North Star: "The Efficient Assistant"**

Dark, sophisticated interface for focused productivity. Indigo-blue accents (#5B6EF5) provide clarity without distraction. Inspired by Linear (precision), Vercel (refinement), Raycast (speed). Motion is intentional, typography is sharp, every pixel earns its place.

**Key Characteristics:**
- Streamlined dark interface
- Indigo-blue accent strategy
- Purposeful motion (150-300ms)
- Minimal, refined visual language
- AI tools integration with sparkle accents

## 2. Color Palette (OKLCH)

### Semantic Colors
| Role | Hex | OKLCH | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| Background | #0A0A0F | oklch(4.5% 0.008 264°) | App background |
| Surface | #111118 | oklch(7% 0.008 264°) | Cards, containers |
| Border | #1E1E2E | oklch(12% 0.008 264°) | Dividers, subtle borders |
| **Primary (Indigo)** | **#5B6EF5** | **oklch(55% 0.2 264°)** | **Buttons, accents, interactive** |
| Primary Hover | #4A5CE0 | oklch(48% 0.2 264°) | Button hover state |
| Text Primary | #E8E8F0 | oklch(92% 0.006 264°) | Headings, body text |
| Text Secondary | #6B6B80 | oklch(48% 0.008 264°) | Hints, secondary info |
| Success | #34D399 | oklch(65% 0.15 150°) | Task completion, positive state |
| Muted | #2A2A38 | oklch(18% 0.008 264°) | Disabled states, backgrounds |

### Strategy: Committed with Restrained Accent
- 70% tinted neutrals (backgrounds, text, borders)
- 25% surfaces and interactive states
- 5% indigo accents on primary actions, form focus, AI highlights

## 3. Typography

### Scale (ratio 1.25)
- **Display (H1)**: 2.5rem (40px), weight 700, letter-spacing -0.02em, line-height 1.1
- **Headline (H2)**: 2rem (32px), weight 700, letter-spacing -0.02em, line-height 1.2
- **Title (H3)**: 1.5rem (24px), weight 700, letter-spacing -0.01em, line-height 1.25
- **Subtitle**: 1.125rem (18px), weight 600, line-height 1.4
- **Body**: 1rem (16px), weight 400, line-height 1.6, max 65–75ch
- **Label**: 0.875rem (14px), weight 500, letter-spacing 0.02em
- **Caption**: 0.75rem (12px), weight 500, letter-spacing 0.01em, opacity 0.75

### Font Stack
```
'Segoe UI', 'Roboto', sans-serif
```
(Humanist sans for approachability + professional clarity)

### Typography Rules
- All headings: weight 700, letter-spacing -0.02em
- Form labels: italic placeholders, slightly dimmer (#6B6B80)
- Strikethrough: completedTodo text uses `line-through`, transition 300ms

## 4. Elevation & Depth

**Flat by default.** Shadows appear only on interaction or container emphasis.

| Context | Shadow | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Hover Card | `0 4px 12px rgba(91, 110, 245, 0.15)` | Todo item hover |
| Active Button | `0 2px 8px rgba(91, 110, 245, 0.2)` | Active state |
| Elevated | `0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)` | Modals, overlays (if used) |

## 5. Motion & Animation

All easings: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) (ease-out-quart)
No layout animations. Transform only (scale, translate, opacity).

### Timing
- **Quick**: 150ms (micro-interactions, hovers)
- **Standard**: 250ms (primary actions, transitions)
- **Slow**: 350ms (modal enters, page transitions)

### Library: Framer Motion
- `motion.div`, `motion.button`, etc. for animated components
- Use `AnimatePresence` for exit animations
- `variants` for staggered sequences

### Key Animations

| Component | Animation | Duration | Easing |
|---|---|---|---|
| Page Load | Staggered fade-in + slide-up (50ms delay) | 250ms each | ease-out-quart |
| Todo Add | Scale 0.95 → 1 + fade in | 250ms | ease-out-quart |
| Todo Complete | Strikethrough (300ms) + checkmark spin | 300ms | ease-out-quart |
| Todo Delete | Slide left -20px + fade out | 200ms | ease-out-quart |
| Tab Switch | Crossfade (opacity) | 200ms | ease-out-quart |
| Button Press | Scale 0.97 (on mouseDown), scale 1 (onUp) | 150ms | ease-out-quart |
| Sidebar Item | Slide in from left (on load) | 250ms | ease-out-quart |

## 6. Components & Patterns

### Buttons
- **Primary**: bg-indigo-500 (#5B6EF5), text-white, rounded-lg (8px), py-2 px-4, weight 600
- **Primary Hover**: bg-indigo-600 (#4A5CE0), shadow-md, scale(1.02)
- **Primary Active**: scale(0.97)
- **Secondary**: border-1 border-border, bg-surface, text-primary, rounded-lg, hover:bg-muted

### Inputs & Forms
- **Text Input**: bg-surface, border border-border, rounded-lg, focus:border-indigo, focus:ring-indigo/20, py-2 px-3
- **Placeholder**: italic, color-text-secondary
- **Label**: Label typography, weight 500, mb-1

### Cards
- **Background**: bg-surface (#111118)
- **Border**: border-1 border-border (optional, subtle)
- **Rounded**: rounded-lg (8px)
- **Padding**: p-4 (tight) or p-6 (spacious)
- **Shadow**: only on hover

### Priority Badges
**Not dots.** Replace with small pill badges:
- **High**: bg-red-900/30, text-red-400, px-2 py-0.5, rounded-full, text-xs, weight 500
- **Medium**: bg-yellow-900/30, text-yellow-400, px-2 py-0.5, rounded-full, text-xs, weight 500
- **Low**: bg-green-900/30, text-green-400, px-2 py-0.5, rounded-full, text-xs, weight 500

### Empty States
- **SVG Illustration**: Minimal floating checklist, dark-themed, indigo accents, soft glow
- **Tagline**: "Your workspace is clear." (Subtitle typography, text-secondary)
- **Background Glow**: Subtle animated gradient glow behind (very faint, never distracting)

### Skeleton Loaders
- **Shimmer Effect**: Animated gradient pulse, bg-muted to bg-surface/50
- **Duration**: 1.5s loop
- **Opacity**: 0.6

### AI Tools Panel
- **Header**: "AI TOOLS" in Label typography, text-secondary, uppercase
- **Icon**: Small sparkle/star SVG (indigo, 16px) next to header
- **Content**: Dark cards, indigo accents on call-to-action buttons

## 7. Do's and Don'ts

### Do:
✅ Use indigo-blue (#5B6EF5) as the primary accent  
✅ Keep animations under 300ms; ease-out curves only  
✅ Maintain 4:1 contrast minimum for all text  
✅ Use rounded-lg (8px) for most components  
✅ Leverage motion for microinteractions, not distraction  
✅ Dark background (#0A0A0F) everywhere  
✅ Pill badges for priority, not dots  

### Don't:
❌ No pink, blush, or warm colors  
❌ No gradient text or glassmorphism  
❌ No spring/bounce easing  
❌ No side-stripe borders  
❌ No heavy shadows (only hover states)  
❌ No cluttered card grids  
❌ No modal-first interactions  

## 8. Breakpoints

| Name | Width | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| sm | 640px | Mobile |
| md | 768px | Tablet |
| lg | 1024px | Desktop |
| xl | 1280px | Wide desktop |

Apply fluid spacing: `px-4 sm:px-6 md:px-8` pattern.
